name: perplexity-mcp-workspace
description: Perplexity MCP workspace with a native VS Code extension, embedded MCP server, and React webview UI

scripts.build: npm run build -w @perplexity-user-mcp/shared && npm run build -w perplexity-user-mcp && npm run build -w @perplexity-user-mcp/webview && npm run build -w perplexity-vscode
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @perplexity-user-mcp/shared && npm run typecheck -w perplexity-user-mcp && npm run typecheck -w @perplexity-user-mcp/webview && npm run typecheck -w perplexity-vscode
scripts.dev:webview: npm run build -w @perplexity-user-mcp/shared && npm run dev -w @perplexity-user-mcp/webview
scripts.dev:extension: npm run build -w @perplexity-user-mcp/shared && npm run watch -w perplexity-vscode
scripts.package:vsix: npm run bump && npm run package:vsix -w perplexity-vscode
